The stock price reacted negatively to the earnings report, with a premarket decline of 7.6% to 89.3 RMB (approximately $96.64 USD).
Thank you all for joining the first quarter 2026 earnings call.
Group revenue in the quarter was RMB 106.2 billion, a year-over-year increase of 11%.
In agriculture, we launched the 2026 Duoduo Premium Produce program.
Our total non-GAAP operating expenses as a percentage of total revenues this quarter was 36%, compared to 38% in the same quarter last year.
On a GAAP basis, operating profit for the quarter was CNY 19.6 billion versus CNY 16.1 billion in the same quarter last year, up 22% year-over-year.
Net income attributable to ordinary shareholders was CNY 12.5 billion for the quarter, compared to CNY 14.7 billion in the same quarter last year.
Second is, in the first quarter, we saw a slight increase in sales and marketing expense ratio of the company alongside a fluctuation in overall profit margin.
